informational so the configurator can display the correct gyro/pid frequencies in the drop-down

mspCodes.name: MSP_NAME
mspCodes.notes: Returns user set board name - betaflight

fields.notes: vbatlevel when buzzer starts to alert
indicate the type of sensor that the next part of the payload is for

mspCodes.name: MSP_RX_MAP
mspCodes.notes: Get RX map (also returns number of channels total)

mspCodes.name: MSP_SET_RX_MAP
mspCodes.notes: Set RX map, numchannels to set comes from MSP_RX_MAP

mspCodes.name: MSP_STATUS
mspCodes.notes: Cycletime & errors_count & sensor present & box activation & current setting number

fields.notes: unconditional part of flags, first 32 bits

mspCodes.name: MSP_RAW_GPS
mspCodes.notes: Fix, numsat, lat, lon, alt, speed, ground course

fields.notes: alt changed from 1m to 0.01m per lsb since MSP API 1.39 by RTH. To maintain backwards compatibility compensate to 1m per lsb in MSP again.
resolution increased in Betaflight 4.4 by factor of 10, this maintains backwards compatibility for DJI OSD

mspCodes.name: MSP_ANALOG
mspCodes.notes: Vbat, powermetersum, rssi if available on RX

fields.notes: send current in 0.01 A steps, range is -320A to 320A

mspCodes.name: MSP_RC_TUNING
mspCodes.notes: RC rate, rc expo, rollpitch rate, yaw rate, dyn throttle PID

mspCodes.name: MSP_PID
mspCodes.notes: P I D coeff (9 are used currently)

mspCodes.name: MSP_WP
mspCodes.notes: Get a WP, WP# is in the payload, returns (WP#, lat, lon, alt, flags) WP#0-home, WP#16-poshold

mspCodes.name: MSP_BOXIDS
mspCodes.notes: Get the permanent IDs associated to BOXes

mspCodes.name: MSP_RC_DEADBAND
mspCodes.notes: Deadbands for yaw alt pitch roll

fields.notes: Starting with 4.0 gyro and acc alignment are the same
send amperage in 0.001 A steps (mA). Negative range is truncated to zero
send current in 0.01 A steps, range is -320A to 320A

mspCodes.name: MSP_ESC_SENSOR_DATA
mspCodes.notes: Extra ESC data from 32-Bit ESCs (Temperature, RPM)

mspCodes.name: MSP_GPS_RESCUE
mspCodes.notes: GPS Rescue angle, returnAltitude, descentDistance, groundSpeed, sanityChecks and minSats

mspCodes.name: MSP_GPS_RESCUE_PIDS
mspCodes.notes: GPS Rescue throttleP and velocity PIDS + yaw P

fields.notes: number of channel frequencies to follow

mspCodes.name: MSP_MOTOR_TELEMETRY
mspCodes.notes: Per-motor telemetry data (RPM, packet stats, ESC temp, etc.)

mspCodes.name: MSP_SIMPLIFIED_TUNING
mspCodes.notes: Get simplified tuning values and enabled state

mspCodes.name: MSP_SET_SIMPLIFIED_TUNING
mspCodes.notes: Set simplified tuning positions and apply calculated tuning

mspCodes.name: MSP_CALCULATE_SIMPLIFIED_PID
mspCodes.notes: Calculate PID values based on sliders without saving

mspCodes.name: MSP_CALCULATE_SIMPLIFIED_GYRO
mspCodes.notes: Calculate gyro filter values based on sliders without saving

mspCodes.name: MSP_CALCULATE_SIMPLIFIED_DTERM
mspCodes.notes: Calculate D term filter values based on sliders without saving

mspCodes.name: MSP_VALIDATE_SIMPLIFIED_TUNING
mspCodes.notes: Returns array of true/false showing which simplified tuning groups match values

mspCodes.name: MSP_STATUS_EX
mspCodes.notes: Cycletime, errors_count, CPU load, sensor present etc

mspCodes.name: MSP_ATTITUDE_QUATERNION
mspCodes.notes: Orientation quaternion components (w, x, y, z)

mspCodes.name: MSP_SET_TX_INFO
mspCodes.notes: Set runtime information from TX lua scripts

mspCodes.name: MSP_TX_INFO
mspCodes.notes: Get runtime information for TX lua scripts

mspCodes.name: MSP_SET_RAW_GPS
mspCodes.notes: Fix, numsat, lat, lon, alt, speed

fields.notes: alt changed from 1m to 0.01m per lsb since MSP API 1.39 by RTH. Received MSP altitudes in 1m per lsb have to upscaled.

mspCodes.name: MSP_SET_PID
mspCodes.notes: P I D coeff (9 are used currently)

mspCodes.name: MSP_SET_RC_TUNING
mspCodes.notes: RC rate, rc expo, rollpitch rate, yaw rate, dyn throttle PID, yaw expo

fields.notes: tpa_rate is moved to PID profile
tpa_breakpoint is moved to PID profile

mspCodes.name: MSP_SET_WP
mspCodes.notes: Sets a given WP (WP#,lat, lon, alt, flags)

mspCodes.name: MSP_SET_HEADING
mspCodes.notes: Define a new heading hold direction

mspCodes.name: MSP_SET_RC_DEADBAND
mspCodes.notes: Deadbands for yaw alt pitch roll

mspCodes.name: MSP_SET_RESET_CURR_PID
mspCodes.notes: Reset current PID profile to defaults

mspCodes.name: MSP_MULTIPLE_MSP
mspCodes.notes: Request multiple MSPs in one request

fields.notes: prepend number of EXTRAs array elements
each element is aligned with MODE_RANGES by the permanentId

mspCodes.name: MSP_SET_SIGNATURE
mspCodes.notes: Set the signature of the board and serial number

fields.notes: 4 variables are here for general monitoring purpose
hdop in 4.4 and earlier, pdop in 4.5 and above
incoming value expected to be in centidegrees, output value in decidegrees

mspCodes.name: MSP2_GET_OSD_WARNINGS
mspCodes.notes: returns active OSD warning message text
